positive: Minimalist geometric pattern of interconnected lunar phases and stylized celestial bodies. The design features clean, bold line work and negative space, rendered in a palette of matte midnight blue, dusty gold, and creamy off-white. Composition is symmetrical and centered, forming a cohesive tapestry suitable for large-scale apparel printing. The pattern should emphasize strong contrast and elegant silhouette repetition, with small star clusters and crescent moons acting as decorative motifs. Clean vector aesthetic, high contrast, flat graphic design, suitable for screen printing.
